summary: Added 16GB swap file configuration to configuration.nix with SSD TRIM optimization. The configuration integrates with existing earlyoom for three-tier memory management. Build verification passed. System activation requires manual sudo execution.

artifacts.summary: Added swapDevices configuration with 16GB swap file at /var/lib/swapfile
Implementation summary with verification results and manual activation steps

completion_data.completion_summary: Configured 16GB swap file in NixOS configuration.nix with SSD TRIM optimization, creating a three-tier memory management system with earlyoom. Build verification passed; requires manual sudo nixos-rebuild switch to activate.

next_steps: Run 'sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#<hostname>' to activate swap configuration, then verify with 'swapon --show' and 'free -h'
